source: O'Neill School of Public and Environmental Affairs at IU

news.title: O'Neill School establishes Jumper Fellowship to support future leaders in international affairs
news.summary_en: O’Neill School establishes the Dr. Roy and Mary Ruth Jumper Fellowship to support MIA students and honor a legacy of public service and international affairs.

news.title: O'Neill School recognizes 2026 Alumni Award winners
news.summary_en: O’Neill School announces 2026 Alumni Award winners, honoring graduates for leadership and impact in public service, education, and national defense.
